body_txt: This is the trope where a character moves their buttocks around, which can be done in several variants: sexual arousal , cockiness , or celebration .  A Sultry Belly Dancer will often incorporate this trope in their dance, shaking their buttocks along with their belly and hips. Taking this trope too far would also overlap with Mooning . Related to Supermodel Strut and possibly also Three Minutes of Writhing ; this will likely happen in the music video for Stuffy Old Songs About the Buttocks . May also overlap with Joke of the Butt , when Played for Laughs rather than for Fanservice . Someone who has Pride in Their Behind might do this.
